articles.author: G. Allen Johnson
articles.title: ‘Star Wars’ editor Marcia Lucas, former wife of George Lucas, dies at 80 - San Francisco Chronicle
articles.description: Marcia Lucas, the Oscar-winning editor of “Star Wars” and “American Graffiti,” died of metastatic cancer.
articles.content: George Lucas, left, and Marcia Lucas attend an event celebrating the release of New York, New York, beginning with a gala screening at Lincoln Center and continuing with an afterparty at Studio 54, i… [+4850 chars]

articles.author: Shawn Tully
articles.title: Surging Treasury yields expose a brutal truth: America has no margin for error on its $39 trillion debt - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: America must refinance $10 trillion in debt over the next year. Rising Treasury yields could make that a catastrophe.
articles.content: In the days before the Memorial Day weekend, rates on 30 year Treasury bonds hit their highest level in 19 years at 5.2%, and the benchmark 10-year reached 4.7%, the top reading since mid-2007. If th… [+6116 chars]
